title: Assign team based on person?
excerpt:
Hey all, 
I cannot figure this one out. 
If a person is assigned to a people column… can this then assign their team in another people column?

posts.author: DannyP (Danny P)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey all,

I cannot figure this one out.

If a person is assigned to a people column… can this then assign their team in another people column?

posts.author: greg_elevate (Gregory Thomson)
posts.cookedHtml:
@DannyP - If I’m understanding correctly, this is the recipe you’re looking for:

image1173×597 20.2 KB

posts.author: DannyP (Danny P)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks Gregory,

Sort of, but not at a board level. Every one of our staff is assigned to a team, setup in the Monday settings.

I was hoping there would be an automation (almost like a mirror column), when a person is assigned, it would assign the team in another column (setup account wide).
